title: Potholes Survey - Karl Turner MP
text_excerpt: Potholes Survey - Karl Turner MP Skip to main content Contact News Surgery Appointments Casework About Sign up to Karl’s Newsletter More Menu 22nd January, 2025 Potholes Survey The government have recently given Hull City Council £4,482,000 to tackle potholes and make our roads better for vehicles. I want to know where you think the council should prioritise this funding and if there are specific streets you feel need attention. Disclaimer- I can only pass on the details to the relevant local authority if you are a resident in Hull East. To do this I require your full name and address and contact details. If you don’t provide me with the details then I will be unable to support you with this request. Potholes Survey Please state the road which has potholes (Required) How long has this been an issue? (Required) Have you reported this to the council? (Required) Yes No Is there more than one pot hole down this street? (Required) Please select Only 1 2-5 5-10 11+ Please feel free to upload a picture of the pothole Max. file size: 10 MB. Are you happy for Karl to report this to the council on your behalf? (Required) Yes No Your contact details I can only pass on the details to the relevant local authority if you are a resident in Hull East. To do this I require your full name and address and contact details. If you don't provide me with the details then I will be unable to support you with this request. Name (Required) First Last Email (Required) Postcode (Required) Would you like to receive my monthly newsletter to receive updates about my work in our constituency and in Parliament (Required) Yes No Contact details 430 Holderness Road, Hull, HU9 3DW, UK View on Google Maps Email: karl.turner.mp@parliament.uk Further details Promoted by East Hull Labour Party on behalf of Karl Turner, both at 430 Holderness Road, Hull, HU9 3DW ©2026 Copyright Labour All rights reserved.
